StructurePhase.Reference: Krachan T., Stelmakhovych B.M., Kuz`ma Y.B., J. Alloys Compd., v349 p134-139 (2003)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1810215. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 820 K for 800 h in sealed evacuated quartz tube, water-quenched. Article Title: The Y-Cu-Al system. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. Minor warning from the LPF Editor exist. LPF Editor Comment: refined composition differs from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: g c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Krachan, T., Stel`makhovych, B. M., Kuz`ma, Y. B., J. Alloys Compd., v349 #1-2 p134-139 (2003)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N3O11. LPF Collection Code: 1810212. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 820 K for 800 h in sealed evacuated quartz tube, water-quenched. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: LPF Editor Comment: refined composition differs from nominal composition. Article Title: The Y-Cu-Al system. Minor Warning: Minor warning from the LPF Editor exist. Wyckoff Sequence: l2 j g c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
